A Change in the Market

A Technology
Once Reserved
for the Few

Paint Protection Film has existed for decades. Originally developed for military use, it was later adopted by the automotive world to protect the most valuable vehicles ever produced.

Supercars.

Hypercars.

Collector vehicles.

For many years, it remained a specialist service — something applied only to vehicles of the highest value. Not because it lacked relevance. But because it lacked accessibility.

Today, more drivers want to preserve the condition of their vehicles. Not just for occasional use. But for everyday driving. T-Shield represents that shift.

Developed by Topaz Detailing, T-Shield brings Paint Protection Film to a wider audience, making it possible to protect vehicles of all types — not just those at the very top of the market.

The Reality of Daily Driving

Every Journey.
Real Wear.

Every journey exposes your vehicle to wear. These are not exceptional events. They are part of normal driving. Over time, they leave a visible impact on the vehicle.

Stone chips from motorway driving
High-speed debris impacts at every speed
Scuffs from entering and exiting
Door edges and sills take daily punishment
Marks from luggage and daily use
Shopping, bags and everyday loading
Contact in car parks and tight spaces
Unavoidable in everyday driving
Paint Protection Film changes where that impact occurs
Instead of affecting the paintwork, the wear is absorbed by the film
Without Protection
Every Journey
What Paint Protection Film Does

An Invisible Barrier
Between Your Car
and the World

Paint Protection Film is a clear, advanced layer applied to the painted surfaces of a vehicle. Once installed, it acts as an invisible barrier between the car and the outside world.

01
Absorbs Impacts & Abrasion
The film absorbs the small impacts and abrasion that would otherwise damage the paint beneath — stone chips, scratches and everyday contact.
02
Self-Healing Technology
Minor scratches that occur in the film can disappear with warmth from sunlight or hot water. The surface continues to maintain its clarity.
03
Original Paint Preserved
Beneath the film, the original paintwork remains completely protected — exactly as it left the factory.
04
Virtually Invisible
Once applied, the film is virtually invisible. There is no change to the appearance of your vehicle — only the protection it gains.
Invisible by Design
Zero visual impact — total surface protection
Full Protection or Targeted Protection

Protection Where
It Matters Most

The ideal solution is full vehicle coverage — every painted surface protected, every panel preserved. For those looking for the highest level of protection, this remains the most complete approach.

But it is not the only option. T-Shield allows protection to be applied to high-wear areas individually — creating a more accessible way to benefit from Paint Protection Film. Protection can be applied where it matters most and extended further over time if required.

High Impact Zone
Front Bumper
The front bumper is the first surface to encounter stone chips, gravel and debris at speed. Even at low speeds in traffic, it is constantly exposed. T-Shield film applied here absorbs every impact before it reaches the paint beneath.
Protection applied where it matters most
And extended further over time if required
Before & After Paint Protection

The Difference Protection Makes

Without Paint Protection Film, everyday driving leaves a visible mark on your paintwork. With T-Shield installed, the film absorbs everything — the paint beneath remains untouched.

AFTER — T-Shield Protected
BEFORE — Unprotected Paint
← Drag to compare before & after →
Virtually Invisible

The Film You
Cannot See.
The Protection
You Can Trust.

Once applied, T-Shield Paint Protection Film is virtually invisible. The edge of the film sits seamlessly against the painted surface — following the natural lines of the car without any visible boundary.

The original appearance of your vehicle is completely preserved. There is no change in colour, gloss or texture. Only the protection changes.

Zero Visual Impact
The film follows the natural lines of the car. Once applied, it remains virtually invisible — protecting without altering.
Self-Healing in Action
Warm water activates the healing process
→
Self-Healing Technology

Minor Scratches
Simply Disappear.

Minor scratches that occur in the film can disappear with warmth from sunlight or hot water. The surface continues to maintain its clarity. The original paint remains preserved beneath.

This is not a repair process — it is an inherent property of the film itself. The same film that absorbs the scratch also heals it, maintaining a flawless appearance over the long term.

Sunlight
Natural warmth from sunlight activates the healing process automatically
Warm Water
A pour of warm water over the affected area restores the surface
"Protection is no longer limited to rare or high-value cars. It is becoming a practical consideration for any vehicle that is used regularly."
T-Shield — A Different Way of Thinking
Precision and Fit

Every Installation.
Designed for
Your Vehicle.

01
Digital Patterning
Templates are created using digital patterning technology to ensure accuracy. Every vehicle is measured precisely — the film is cut to fit your exact model.
02
Precision Cut
Each panel is cut precisely before installation. No blades are used on the vehicle. The film arrives pre-cut, ready to apply without any risk to your paintwork.
03
Professional Installation
Applied by trained Topaz technicians using specialist methods developed over more than a decade of working with the world's most valuable vehicles.
04
Seamless Finish
The result is a clean, seamless finish that follows the natural lines of the car. Once applied, the film remains virtually invisible — protecting without altering.
Built on Topaz Expertise

The Same
Standards.
Every Vehicle.

T-Shield is developed by Topaz Detailing. For more than a decade, Topaz has worked with some of the world's most valuable vehicles, applying Paint Protection Film to the highest standards.

This experience has shaped the way T-Shield is designed and installed. The same principles of precision, consistency and attention to detail are applied throughout.

15+
Years of PPF

Book a Consultation Our Warranty
Long-Term Confidence

Five-Year
Warranty.
Total Peace
of Mind.

Paint Protection Film is not simply about immediate results. It is about long-term preservation.

T-Shield is supported by a five-year warranty covering the integrity of the film and its installation. Over time, the film absorbs the wear that would otherwise affect the vehicle.

If required, it can be replaced. The paint beneath remains protected.

T-Shield Warranty Covers
Film integrity guaranteed for 5 years
Installation quality covered throughout
Film can be replaced if required
Original paint remains protected throughout
5
5
Year Warranty
Covering the integrity of the film and its installation
Backed by Topaz Detailing — the world standard in PPF since 2009
Protecting What You Use Every Day

Protecting Them
Should Not Be
Reserved for
a Select Few.

Vehicles are part of daily life. They are used, relied upon and exposed to the environment every day. T-Shield makes Paint Protection Film accessible in a way that reflects how cars are actually used. A practical solution. For real-world driving.
